actions.text: (-white)Your and the enemy's base are seperated by a river, so you'll need to research and produce hover units to attack the enemy across the river.
(-white)Research and place the [res://textures/blocks/units/HoverFabricator/HoverFabricatorComplete.png]Hover Fabricator, and supply it with copper, silicon, and power.
(-white)Now command your units to destroy the enemy.
